name: AimFast.Dev — Free Trend Discovery & Market Intelligence
description: Automated trend discovery platform scanning 21+ sources (HN, Reddit, GitHub, Product Hunt, X/Twitter, DEV, V2EX, Lobsters, HuggingFace, ArXiv, npm, PyPI, Stack Overflow, YouTube, Google Trends, Douban, Xiaohongshu, w2solo, Indie Hackers) nightly with an LLM pipeline. Tracks 170+ emerging tech terms with Builder Score (0-100), 4-tier maturity stage classification (Nascent/Emergent/Validating/Rising), and cross-source validation (min 2 independent sources). Free, no signup. Updated daily.
features: Daily trend discovery from 21+ global sources
Builder Score — 5-factor weighted composite (source_count ×15 + growth ×12 + authority ×8 + mentions ×5 + freshness ×10)
4-tier maturity stage classification (Nascent 0-7d, Emergent 8-30d, Validating 31-90d, Rising 90d+)
Daily LLM-generated reports (3,000-6,000 chars) with structured decisions
RSS feeds for articles and reports

pricing.free: Trend discovery, browsing, basic tracking (3 terms)
pricing.builder: $39/mo — daily decisions, topic monitoring, unlimited tracking
pricing.team: $79/mo — 3 seats, shared boards, CSV export, API access
